offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile daily bank transactions instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: discrepancies between bank transactions and accounting records
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Join community forums for accounting tools discussions
try_it: Let users try manual transaction entry and discrepancy flagging on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Gather 10 short interviews from target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Offer one-click export of simple reports
